home.exploreText: Join us for unforgettable adventures and discover the hidden gems of Georgia.
home.shuttleText: We have an extensive network of shuttle services to get you where you need to go.

shuttle.title: Shuttle Service
shuttle.description: Hikasus Travel offers private transfers from any city of Georgia, providing safe and convenient transportation in sedans, minivans, minibuses, and larger vehicles. Whether you're traveling from Tbilisi to Batumi, Yerevan (Armenia), Kutaisi, Kazbegi, or any other destination – or simply return – our professional drivers ensure a smooth and hassle-free journey. Ideal for solo travelers, families, and groups, our transfer services are comfortable, punctual, and competitively priced. Book your transfer today and explore Georgia with ease!
shuttle.noRoutes: No routes found for the selected combination.

contact.getBack: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.intro:
Ready to explore the wild beauty of Georgia's mountains? Whether you have a question, need help choosing a route, or want to plan a custom hiking tour, we're here for you.
Reach out anytime — our team of local experts is happy to guide you toward your next adventure.
benefits.title: Why Travel With Us
benefits.pricesText: We work directly with local partners, cutting out the middlemen — so you get premium experiences at better prices than booking separately.
benefits.plannedText: From airport pickup to every hotel, meal, and activity — your entire trip is organized down to the last detail before you arrive.
benefits.relaxText: No juggling bookings or worrying about logistics. Our team handles everything on the ground so you can focus on enjoying Georgia.
benefits.localText: Our guides are born and raised in Georgia. They'll take you beyond the tourist trails to authentic places most visitors never discover.
testimonials.title: What Our Travelers Say
testimonials.text1: From the moment we landed, everything was taken care of. Our guide knew the best hidden restaurants, secret viewpoints, and made us feel like family. The best travel experience we've ever had.
testimonials.text2: We were blown away by the value. The hotels, meals, and private transfers — everything was premium quality at a fraction of what we expected to pay. Already planning our return trip!
testimonials.text3: Georgia stole our hearts, and Hikasus made it effortless. Zero stress, incredible food, breathtaking mountains. We didn't have to think about a single detail — just enjoy.
